about.title: About
about.subtitle: The story behind why we built MedMate and where we're headed.
about.story_p1: MedMate was born from the universal experience of uncertainty in health. We wanted to create a platform where anyone, anywhere, could get clear, calm, and trustworthy health information without fear or confusion.
about.story_p2: Healthcare is often complicated, inaccessible, and overwhelming. MedMate aims to simplify that journey. By leveraging advanced AI, we provide instant symptom analysis, ongoing health conversations, and guidance for finding care.
about.story_p3: We are committed to privacy, clarity, and compassion. MedMate is not a replacement for professional medical advice, but a companion for those moments when you need answers or a starting point.
about.story_p4: Thank you for being part of our journey. If you have feedback or want to connect, we're always listening.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about MedMate's features, privacy, and more.
faq.a1: MedMate is an AI-powered health assistant that helps you understand symptoms, get preliminary medical insights, find nearby hospitals, and chat with an intelligent medical assistant — all in one secure platform.
faq.q2: Is MedMate a replacement for seeing a doctor?
faq.a2: No. MedMate provides informational guidance and AI-generated insights, but it is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider.
faq.a3: Simply create a free account, then use the Symptom Checker, AI Chat, or Hospital Finder from your dashboard.
faq.q4: How accurate is the AI diagnosis?
faq.a4: Our AI is trained on extensive medical literature and is continuously updated. It is intended as a preliminary guide and should not replace a professional clinical evaluation.
faq.q5: What AI model does MedMate use?
faq.a5: MedMate uses state-of-the-art large language models fine-tuned on medical data, combined with retrieval-augmented generation.
faq.a6: Absolutely. All data is encrypted using AES-256 encryption. We never sell your data to third parties.
faq.q7: Who can see my health information?
faq.a7: Only you can access your personal health data. Our support team may access anonymized diagnostic logs solely for improving the service.
faq.q8: Can I delete my account and data?
faq.a8: Yes. You can request full deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by contacting our support team.

terms.title: Terms &
terms.read_carefully: Please read these terms carefully before using MedMate.
terms.s1_body: By accessing or using MedMate, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, you may not use the Service.
terms.s2_body: MedMate is an AI-powered health information platform for general health insights, symptom analysis, and wellness guidance. It does not constitute medical advice.
terms.s3_body: MedMate is not a medical device. Always seek advice from a qualified healthcare provider for any medical condition.
terms.s4_body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activities under your account.
terms.s5_body: You agree not to use the Service to upload harmful content, gain unauthorized access, scrape data, impersonate others, or violate applicable laws.
terms.s6_body: All content and trademarks are owned by MedMate or its licensors. You may not reproduce or distribute content without written permission.
terms.s7_body: MedMate shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service.
terms.s8_body: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.
terms.s9_body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
terms.s10_body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws.
terms.s11_body: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at rohillamanas06@gmail.com.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and the rights you have.
privacy.s1_body: We collect account info (name, email, password), health information you voluntarily submit, usage data, and device information.
privacy.s2_body: We use the information to provide and improve the Service, personalize your experience, send transactional emails, detect fraud, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.s3_body: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. We may share it with trusted service providers, when required by law, or in connection with a business transfer.
privacy.s4_body: We implement AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 encryption in transit, access controls, and regular security audits.
privacy.s5_body: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion at any time.
privacy.s6_body: You may have the right to access, correct, delete, or port your personal data. Contact us at privacy@medmate.ai to exercise these rights.
privacy.s7_body: We use cookies to maintain your session, remember preferences, and analyze usage patterns. You can control cookie settings through your browser.
privacy.s8_body: The Service is not directed to individuals under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.s9_body: The Service may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
privacy.s10_body: We may update this Privacy Policy and will notify you of material changes via email or a prominent notice on the Service.
privacy.s11_body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at rohillamanas06@gmail.com.
